message:
🌱 Add lima: v1.0 roadmap: change the default mount driver from mission (#1158)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "lima-971-v1-0-roadmap-change-the-default-mount-driver-from-reverse-sshfs-to-9p-f",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "lima: v1.0 roadmap: change the default mount driver from reverse-sshfs to 9p (for QEMU) and virtiofs (for vz)",
+    "description": "v1.0 roadmap: change the default mount driver from reverse-sshfs to 9p (for QEMU) and virtiofs (for vz). Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current lima setup",
+        "description": "Verify your lima version and configuration:\n```bash\nlimactl --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working lima installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review lima configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant lima configuration:\nhttps://github.com/lima-vm/lima/blob/master/docs/mount.md\n\nLima v1.0 will change the default mount driver from reverse-sshfs to 9p for QEMU, virtiofs for vz."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for v1.0 roadmap: change the default mount driver from…",
+        "description": "The `mapped-xattr` model is known to be incompatible with symlinks: https://gitlab.com/qemu-project/qemu/-/issues/173\n\nThe `none` model is obviously incompatible with chown, but this is fine, as the reverse-sshfs does not support chown either.\n\nSee issue #971\n```yaml\nnerdctl run --rm -v /Users/$(whoami):/mnt --user 100 alpine cat /mnt/.bashrc\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"v1.0 roadmap: change the default mount driver from…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The `mapped-xattr` model is known to be incompatible with symlinks: https://gitlab.com/qemu-project/qemu/-/issues/173\n\nThe `none` model is obviously incompatible with chown, but this is fine, as the reverse-sshfs does not support chown either.\n\nSee issue #971",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "nerdctl run --rm -v /Users/$(whoami):/mnt --user 100 alpine cat /mnt/.bashrc",
+        "# attempt uid 100, failed\n$ nerdctl -- run --rm -v /Users/$(whoami):/mnt --user 100 alpine cat /mnt/.bashrc\ncat: can't open '/mnt/.bashrc': Permission denied\nFATA[0000] exit status 1",
+        "# attempt uid 0, success\n$ nerdctl -- run --rm -v /Users/$(whoami):/mnt alpine cat /mnt/.bashrc\n[ -f ~/.fzf.bash ] && source ~/.fzf.bash"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "lima",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+    ],

+      "pr": "https://github.com/lima-vm/lima/pull/1110"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+      "limactl"
+    ],

+  },
